title: Settlements & Self-Billing
subtitle: Review monthly commission settlements and authorize legal invoices from your business to Aipify Group AS.
errorMessage: Aipify could not complete this operation right now. The issue has been logged for review.
accessDenied: Settlement access is not available for your role.
prepared: Settlement draft prepared for your review.
selfBillingDescription: Before Aipify can generate legal invoices on behalf of your business, you must accept the self-billing agreement. Growth Partners are suppliers — not employees.
agreementRequired: Accept the self-billing agreement before preparing or approving settlements.
approvalText: I confirm that this settlement is correct and authorize Aipify Group AS to generate this invoice on behalf of my business.
approved: Settlement approved. Legal invoice generated and sent to accounting.
actionFailed: This action could not be completed. Please try again.
